---
title: "Book Planned"
subtitle: " "
pagetitle: "Book Planned"
author: "Jarrod Dalton"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
bibliography: ["references/book.bib"]
csl: "references/apa.csl"
link-citations: true
description: "A bookdown scaffold for a semester-style course book."
output:
  bookdown::gitbook:
    css: style.css
---

# Preface {-}

A book is planned. What is currently here is a bookdown scaffold.

**Build command:** `bookdown::render_book("index.Rmd")`
